title: populus × canadensis var. virginiana
intro: Populus × canadensis var. virginiana, also known as the Eastern Cottonwood, is a deciduous tree species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Populus × canadensis var. virginiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
